title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 521.330 - Receiver, report, money retained, how — compensation
text:
521.330.  Receiver, report, money retained, how — compensation. — The receiver shall, when required, report his proceedings to the court, and shall hold all moneys collected, and all property received by him, subject to the order of the court.  He shall receive such compensation as the court may allow.
(RSMo 1939 § 1470) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1306; 1919 § 1757; 1909 § 2326
